posts.title: የግሉ ዘርፍ እና የኃይል አቅርቦት
content: የግሉ ዘርፍ እና የኃይል አቅርቦት በተመለከተ በቅርቡ የተደረገ ዝግጅት ላይ የተወሰዱ አበይት ጉዳዮች፡፡

posts.title: Debrezeyet mobile solar pump exhibition
posts.excerpt: Debrezeyet mobile solar pump exhibition for farmers and government officials.
content: Meseret Mare Gebre Solar Importer participated in the Debrezeyet mobile solar pump exhibition.
The event showcased affordable and efficient solar water pumping solutions tailored for Ethiopian farmers, attended by key government officials and agricultural stakeholders.

posts.title: Hawassa panel discussion with Hawassa water and energy minister
posts.excerpt: Organized by SNV and ESEDA in Hawassa.
content: A fruitful panel discussion took place in Hawassa alongside the Water and Energy Minister, organized by SNV and ESEDA.
The talks focused on expanding clean energy access and fostering strong public-private partnerships in the solar sector.

posts.title: Sidama region meeting and site visit
posts.excerpt: Sidama region meeting and site visit with local farmers.
content: Our team conducted a site visit and held a community meeting in the Sidama region.
We engaged directly with local farmers to understand their energy needs and demonstrate the impact of our solar irrigation solutions.

posts.title: Participation in Water and Energy Fair
posts.excerpt: Meseret Mare Gebre - Solar Importer has participated in Water and Energy Fair.
content: Meseret Mare Gebre Solar Importer participated in the Water and Energy Fair organized by the Ministry of Water and Energy.
The fair served as an excellent platform to showcase our Lighting Global certified solar products to a broader audience.

posts.title: Our Products on Local Market
posts.excerpt: Solar products being distributed at local markets across Ethiopia.
content: Our certified solar products reaching communities through local market distribution channels, making clean energy accessible to rural households.

posts.title: Our Products Beneficiaries
posts.excerpt: Families benefiting from solar home systems in rural areas.
content: Families in rural Ethiopia now enjoy reliable lighting and phone charging thanks to our solar home kits, replacing dangerous kerosene lamps.

posts.title: Training Participants on Solar Systems
posts.excerpt: Community training session on solar system maintenance and usage.
content: Hands-on training sessions for local technicians and community members on the installation, maintenance, and troubleshooting of solar systems.

posts.title: Mobile Solar Water Pump in Action
posts.excerpt: Mobile solar water pump built by Meseret Mare Gebre operating in the field.
content: Our mobile solar water pump system designed for flexibility — easily transported to different farm sites for irrigation and community drinking water supply.

posts.title: Water and Energy Fair Highlights
posts.excerpt: Opening ceremony of the Water and Energy Fair.
content: The Water and Energy Fair opening ceremony brought together government officials, NGOs, and private sector leaders to discuss Ethiopia's clean energy future.

posts.title: Higher Gov't Officials Visiting Solar Energy Fair
posts.excerpt: Senior government officials touring the solar energy exhibition.
content: High-ranking government officials visited our booth at the solar energy fair, showing strong support for private sector solar energy initiatives.

posts.title: Memory on Solar Energy Fair
posts.excerpt: Memorable moments from the solar energy exhibition.
content: A look back at the connections made and partnerships formed during the solar energy fair — a milestone event for Ethiopia's renewable energy sector.
